summary: Frontend testing of /play page: orange color scheme, tab layout, dimension cards/products, Mira Picks, Find Play, Book a Service, GuidedPlayPaths - 8/9 features passing. One bug found in Mira Picks section (loading state never resolves due to slow service picks API).

minor.issue: Service picks endpoint intermittently takes 5+ seconds or times out (product picks takes 0.2s). In browser, MiraPicksSection uses Promise.all which never resolves if service picks hangs. Confirmed: 4 requests made, only 1 response received in 10 seconds. Root cause: service picks slow API.

ui_bugs.issue: Mira Picks section shows title/subtitle but cards area remains BLANK (never shows AI picks OR Mira Imagines fallback). Root cause: Promise.all([productFetch, serviceFetch]) never resolves because service picks API is slow/hangs. loading=true persists indefinitely. Fix: use Promise.allSettled or add individual fetch timeouts.

issues: Mira Picks section blank area between section title and 'Play for {name}' heading creates visual gap - no loading spinner shown during loading state

action_items: Fix MiraPicksSection to use Promise.allSettled instead of Promise.all, OR add timeout per fetch (e.g. 5s max), so if service picks is slow the Mira Imagines fallback still shows after timeout
Optionally add loading spinner in MiraPicksSection during loading state to avoid blank white area
critical_code_review_comments: MiraPicksSection Promise.all() on line 287 will hang indefinitely if either fetch takes too long. Should use Promise.allSettled or AbortController with timeout pattern (like ActivityProfile uses)
4 duplicate claude-picks requests being made (2 React renders × 2 fetch calls) - component is re-rendering twice. Minor - investigate if currentPet causes double-render
test_credentials: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 (email auth for frontend user)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 (NOT 'aditya/lola4304' which is admin-only). All 9 required features tested: 1-5 (hero/tabs/dims/products) PASS, 6 (Mira Picks) FAIL due to slow service API, 7-9 (Find Play/Book Service/GuidedPaths) PASS. The Mira Imagines fallback worked on very first load (before pet data loaded) but fails on subsequent loads. See /api/mira/claude-picks timing issue.

rca_of_issue.bug: Mira Picks section blank (loading never resolves)
rca_of_issue.reproduction: Navigate to /play after login, wait 10+ seconds. The 'Mira Picks' section shows title/subtitle but no cards at all (neither AI picks nor Mira Imagines fallback)
rca_of_issue.root_cause: MiraPicksSection uses Promise.all([productFetch, serviceFetch]). Product fetch responds in 0.2s but service fetch takes 5+ seconds. Promise.all waits for BOTH to complete. In the 10-second test window, only 1 of 4 claude-picks requests got a response. The component stays in loading=true state indefinitely.
rca_of_issue.verified_via: Network request interception showed 4 claude-picks requests made, only 1 response received in 10 seconds. Direct curl test: product picks = 0.2s (12 results), service picks = 5.1s (slow/empty on first call)
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Replace Promise.all with Promise.allSettled, or add AbortController with 5-second timeout to each fetch (matching the pattern already used in ActivityProfile component)
